items.name_cn:
【Genuine Leather】#Envelope# Small 21CM
Genuine leather embossed quilted envelope bag, classic is eternal. Stunning V-pattern combined with a diamond-quilted caviar texture. Italian ZP genuine cowhide paired with a bold Y-logo, combining elegance and fashion. It feels like ZP when held! Definitely take it to the counter for comparison! Counter price 14600.... Don't waste money! Buying from us is enough!
Model: 526286~600915 Genuine Leather
Size: 21x13x6cm 168500

items.name_cn:
【Genuine Leather】#LouLou puffer# Medium 29CM
LOULOU PUFFER quilted lambskin bag, made with genuine authentic leather, soft and delicate to the touch, like holding a cloud ☁️; classic Y brand logo, chain, and buckle eyes are all in matte silver gold hardware; the bag opening uses a magnetic four-buckle closure, offering excellent sealing and security; the bag features a zippered inner pocket for your phone and valuables, with no other unnecessary pockets, making it easy to use! Genuine leather! Genuine leather! Genuine leather! Size: 29x17x11cm Model No.: 577476 168600

items.name_cn:
【Green】
CALYPSO_ Elephant Calfskin Chain Bag
Made from imported Italian calf leather, it is soft and delicate to the touch. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are finished in matte gold hardware. The bag features a magnetic four-clasp closure at the opening for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables; aside from this, there are no extra pockets, allowing for effortless use!
Size: 35.5×21×9cm
Model: 777399

items.name_cn:
【Original Leather】
A new minimalist bucket bag featuring imported lambskin drawstrings and a signature logo. Large capacity design combining style and practicality. Very spacious. The smooth lambskin texture feels premium. Includes a detachable pouch. Adjustable shoulder strap allows you to switch between a shoulder bag and a crossbody bag. Perfect for various daily occasions. Full of dimensionality. Perfectly interprets understated minimalism~
Model: 804302
Size: 24×30×12cm
